files.description: Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for Swift actor isolation review.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for architectural review of Swift changes.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for blocking and timing primitive review.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for keeping browser socket automation WebKit waits off the main actor.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for fixed sleeps, delays, and polling used as runtime synchronization.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for complete localization across every supported app and web locale.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for scalable collection algorithms and benchmark-backed complexity choices.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for keeping large agent-history JSON, transcript, trajectory, and syscall loads off MainActor and interactive Swift paths.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for Swift concurrency modernization review.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for @concurrent and nonisolated async review.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for SwiftPM package boundary review.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for production Swift logging review.
Source-of-truth cmux lint rule for SwiftUI state and layout review.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule against adding test-only or debug-only seams to production Swift Sources.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule against ambient global state: top-level free functions, global mutable vars, static-only namespace types, and new singletons that should be owned and injected.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule against per-call allocating formatting (String(format:), per-call formatters) on hot or concurrent Swift paths.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule requiring a single reliable source of truth for correctness-critical detection/identity, with no title/name heuristics or unreliable fallbacks.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule requiring relevant Base UI or local React primitives for custom interactive UI accessibility and keyboard behavior.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for local/generated artifacts that should not enter source control.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for SwiftPM Package.resolved lockfile policy.
Repo-local guidance for cmux Swift, SwiftUI, testing, shortcut, localization, and no-sleep policies.
Repo-local guidance for cmux agents, Swift conventions, testing, shortcuts, localization, and no-sleep policies.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for keeping README features consistent with the marketing site features and FAQ.
Source-of-truth cmux review rule for keeping new landing pages registered in sitemap.ts, agentReadablePages, the /guides index, and landing.links.
